title: Ordni dwar ix-Xoljiment ta l-Air Traffic Control Corps u ta l-Airport Company tal-Forzi Armati ta Malta
title_en: Ordni dwar ix-Xoljiment ta l-Air Traffic Control Corps u ta l-Airport Company tal-Forzi Armati ta Malta
description: Official text from legislation.mt (eli/sl/220.9/mlt, expression eli/sl/220.9/20100722/mlt).

provisions.title: L-AVVI| LEGALI 112 ta’ l-1998
provisions.content:
It-titolu ta’ dan l-Ordni hu Ordni dwar ix-Xoljiment ta’ lAir Traffic Control Corps u ta’ l-Airport Company tal-Forzi Armati
ta’ Malta.

provisions.title: ta’ Malta
provisions.content:
Huwa b’dan iddikjarat li l-Air Traffic Control Corps u lAirport Company tal-Forzi Armati ta’ Malta qeg]din b’dan ji[u
xolti u li issa tne]]ew minn Korpi g]all-finijiet ta’ l-Att dwar ilForzi Armati ta’ Malta u ta’ kull regolament maghmul ta]t dak lAtt.

Titolu.

Xoljiment ta’ l-Air
Traffic Control
Corps u ta’ lAirport Company.
Kap. 220.
